data.title: Add Friction Suggestions section to retro-gather.sh and retro SKILL.md
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Context
Implement story 434c-ca05: retro integration for suggestion synthesis.

Read the full story context: .claude/scripts/dso ticket show 434c-ca05

## Summary
Add a SUGGESTION_DATA structured section to plugins/dso/scripts/retro-gather.sh that reads .tickets-tracker/.suggestions/*.json, groups by affected_file/skill_name, and outputs frequency-ranked clusters. Add a Friction Suggestions phase to plugins/dso/skills/retro/SKILL.md that reads SUGGESTION_DATA and proposes edits. Omit section when no suggestions exist. Timestamp-based filtering via TRACKER_DIR for performance.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] retro-gather.sh outputs SUGGESTION_DATA section when .suggestions/ contains records
- [ ] Section omitted when .suggestions/ empty or absent
- [ ] retro SKILL.md has Friction Suggestions phase
- [ ] Clusters ranked by frequency with file, pattern, proposed edit
